note: worktree was dirty at task creation

复核结论 changes_requested。结构 contract 有以下阻断项： 1) V005 未实现 brief 的全量字段与约束。所有 8 表业务 ID 都缺少小写 UUID v4 CHECK；comparison_run 缺 quality_policy identity、comparison contract identity/checksum，未形成 algorithm、quality policy、comparison contract 三组 identity/version/full checksum；idx_comparison_run_workspace_created 缺 run id，不能支撑 createdAt+runId 稳定 cursor。 2) JSON/数值/时间约束不足。集合 JSON 仅 json_valid，允许对象；evidence_refs_json 默认 [] 且允许空，违反非空 evidence refs；value、weight、raw_delta 等未统一拒绝非有限值；period 只检查连字符不检查数字；created_at 默认 datetime(now) 为秒精度，其他系统时间也无 UTC 毫秒格式 CHECK；failed explanation outcome 允许 error_message NULL，违反失败需保存脱敏 message。独立探针已成功插入 id=NOT-A-UUID、quality_reasons_json={}，并读到秒精度 created_at，证明不是理论风险。请补负向测试。 3) 测试证据与 handoff 声明不符。Admin 测试只导入 dangerous-ops.PROTECTED_TABLES，没有验证 admin-database 的 IMMUTABLE_TABLES、isTruncatable/isDroppable 或 overview；schema-check 测试没有调用 validateSchema，只重复查询 sqlite_master；migration/fresh 一致测试直接对同一个 COMPARISON_DDL 执行两次，没有验证 schema.ts re-export 和实际接入边界。请测试真实 authority/entrypoint，或重构为可直接复用和测试的纯 contract。 4) dangerous-ops.ts 额外补入 SIMULATED_MARKET_DDL，超出允许范围中仅 Comparison rebuild 接入的限制；handoff 同时承认 pre-existing gap 却写 Contract Drift 无。请移除该顺手修复，或先提交 contract change request，不得混入 T0037。 独立验证：typecheck、T0036 runner 16/16、T0037 schema tests 19/19、guard:worktree、git diff --check 均通过，受保护 fixture 路径无 diff；通过不豁免上述覆盖缺口。Memory Used 的 Do not trust PRD or subagent summaries for falsifiable external-repo facts 影响了 DDL/route 真源核对；Handoff claims must be verified against actual test evidence before submission 影响了测试逐项对照。Memory Candidates 缺生命周期 metadata，本轮不提升。

第二轮复核仍需 changes_requested，剩余三个 bounded 阻断项： 1) finite number 约束仍未实现。V005 用 typeof(x)=real 声称拒绝非有限值，但 SQLite 将 Infinity 存为 real；独立探针 CREATE TABLE t(x REAL CHECK(typeof(x)=real AND x>0)) 后成功 bind Infinity。当前 comparison_dimension_evidence.value、assessment.weight、raw_delta 会接受 Infinity。请增加真正的 finite CHECK，并为每类无范围 REAL 字段补 Infinity 负向测试；已有 0-100 范围字段可由边界 CHECK 拒绝。 2) comparison_explanation_outcome.content_json 被强制 json_type=array，与 WorkPLS 权威 contract 漂移。WorkPLS schema-constraints.test.ts 的成功内容是对象，包含 conclusion、similarities、differences、opportunities、risks、nextSteps；brief 也只把集合字段要求为数组，content 属受控对象。请改为 object 形态并补对象成功、数组拒绝测试。 3) 名为 validateSchema 的测试仍没有调用 validateSchema，注释明确写 use direct check 并再次复制 sqlite_master 逻辑，未关闭上一轮意见。请在 schema-check.ts 提取可注入 DatabaseSync 的纯 checker，由 validateSchema(workspaceId) 与 contract test 共同调用，或用安全临时 workspace 调真实 validateSchema；不得继续用 replicate checker logic 代替真实 authority。Admin 的 IMMUTABLE_TABLES/isTruncatable/isDroppable 已改为直接导入，上一轮该部分已关闭；如 handoff 继续声称 CODE_TABLES/classifyTable 也有测试，则需补真实验证或删除该声明。 独立验证：typecheck、schema contract 26/26、runner contract 16/16、guard:worktree、git diff --check 均通过；通过不覆盖上述漏测。SIMULATED_MARKET_DDL 越界改动已移除。Memory Used 两条继续实际影响源码真源核对和测试声明复核；Memory Candidates 缺 lifecycle metadata，本轮不提升。

Decision: changes_requested (revision 3). The three previous semantic blockers are closed: the revised DDL rejects SQLite infinities in the tested fields, content_json now follows the authoritative WorkPLS object contract, and the contract test imports the real checkSchema function. New blocking regression: apps/server/src/db/schema-check.ts:80 computes viewExtra with dbViews.filter(v => !dbViews.includes(v)), which is always empty. As a result, schema-check cannot report unexpected database views. Compare against codeViews instead and add a negative regression test that creates an extra view and asserts it appears in viewExtra. Also correct the finite-boundary explanation in handoff/notes: in SQLite, 1e998 overflows to positive Infinity; it is not an arbitrary large finite boundary. Either use an explicit finite maximum or accurately document the overflow-to-infinity comparison mechanism while retaining negative tests. Independent verification: typecheck passed; portrait-comparison schema contract 28/28 passed; migration-runner contract 16/16 passed; guard:worktree passed; git diff --check and protected-path status were clean. The passing suite does not cover the extra-view branch, which is why the regression escaped. Memory Used: 'Do not trust PRD or subagent summaries for falsifiable external-repo facts' affected verification of the WorkPLS content contract and SQLite behavior; 'Handoff claims must be verified against actual test evidence before submission' affected rerunning the claimed tests and auditing the checker negative paths. Memory candidates lack lifecycle metadata and are not promoted.

Decision: changes_requested (revision 4). The previous viewExtra blocker is closed: schema-check now compares dbViews against codeViews, and the new v_stray negative test exercises the real checkSchema authority. Blocking finite-number contract defect: V005 uses strict bounds x > -1.7976931348623157e+308 AND x < 1.7976931348623157e+308. This rejects Number.MAX_VALUE and -Number.MAX_VALUE even though both are finite. An independent node:sqlite probe returned MAX_VALUE_REJECTED and confirmed the SQL literal equals Number.MAX_VALUE. The handoff statement that every finite value is less than max is false. Use inclusive finite bounds (>= -max and <= max; weight > 0 and <= max) or an equivalent exact finite predicate, and add positive boundary tests for finite max/min alongside the existing Infinity rejection tests. Documentation/handoff must be internally consistent: docs/notes-backend.md still contains the old 1e998/28-test bullet after the new max-double/29-test bullet, and revision 4 handoff no longer contains the brief-required full 8-table constraint matrix, full Files Changed list, Admin protection evidence, cleanup review, or Memory Candidates. Consolidate the final handoff rather than leaving only the round-4 delta, and correct all stale 1e998/28 assertions. Independent verification: typecheck passed; portrait-comparison schema contract 29/29 passed; migration-runner contract 16/16 passed; guard:worktree passed; git diff --check and protected-path status were clean. The existing suite has no finite Number.MAX_VALUE acceptance test, which is why the strict-bound defect escaped. Memory Used: 'Do not trust PRD or subagent summaries for falsifiable external-repo facts' affected the direct node:sqlite boundary probe; 'Handoff claims must be verified against actual test evidence before submission' affected rerunning the claimed suites and comparing the handoff with the actual notes and test coverage. No Memory Candidate is promoted.

Decision: approved (final revision). Actual diff and final handoff match T0037 allowed_paths. Accepted out-of-scope diffs are pre-existing and not part of this handoff: apps/server/src/db/migration-runner.ts and docs/notes-infra.md belong to approved T0036; .mimocode/.cron-lock is unrelated workspace state. Revision 5 closes the remaining blockers: value/raw_delta use inclusive IEEE-754 finite bounds, weight uses >0 and <= max, Infinity remains rejected, and the new boundary test accepts Number.MAX_VALUE and -Number.MAX_VALUE. The earlier viewExtra regression remains correctly fixed and covered by a real checkSchema extra-view test. The final handoff contains the complete 8-table constraint matrix, full changed-file list, Admin protection evidence, cleanup review, contract drift, risks, and memory sections. docs/notes-backend.md no longer contains stale 1e998 or 28/29-test claims and reports the verified 30-test suite. Independent validation: apps/server typecheck passed; portrait-comparison-schema contract 30/30 passed; migration-runner contract 16/16 passed; root guard:worktree passed; git diff --check and protected-path status were clean. Residual non-blocking gaps are recorded for later scope: ws_demo backup ignore/guard policy, pre-existing rebuild omission of SIMULATED_MARKET_DDL, and direct route-level CODE_TABLES/classifyTable coverage. Memory Used: 'Do not trust PRD or subagent summaries for falsifiable external-repo facts' affected direct verification of SQLite finite-boundary behavior and actual source contracts; 'Handoff claims must be verified against actual test evidence before submission' affected rerunning all claimed suites and reconciling notes/handoff against actual tests. Memory Candidates are not promoted because they do not include the required lifecycle metadata.
